title: GetResponse<T> is a single shared generic, not per-method duplicates
description: GetResponse<T> in mod.rs is parameterized on the object type. A contributor might suggest replacing it with concrete structs per method to avoid generics. That would duplicate the accountId/state/list/notFound envelope five times. The generic directly encodes the RFC 8620 §5.1 invariant that every /get response has the same wire shape regardless of object type. A single struct also means a future spec field addition is a one-line change.
